# MegaChad

> Burn-to-create looksmaxxing engine and MegaETH universal portal. Burn $MEGACHAD tokens to generate AI-enhanced portraits, mint NFTs, and earn on-chain reputation. Features cross-chain intents, natural language transactions, identity layer, and 19 MCP tools. ERC-8004 registered agent with x402 payment support.

MegaChad is a burn-to-create protocol and MegaETH portal (chain ID 4326). Users burn 225,000 $MEGACHAD tokens (split: 112,500 to dead address + 112,500 to tren fund) along with a 1 USDm infra fee via x402 to generate AI looksmaxxed portraits and mint them as NFTs.

The protocol has two tokens: $MEGACHAD (primary burn token) and $MEGAGOONER (governance/reward token minted via burn participation).

- Chain: MegaETH (chain ID 4326, ~250ms blocks)
- RPC: https://mainnet.megaeth.com/rpc
- ERC-8004 Agent ID: 12408
- x402 Payments: via Meridian (1 USDm per looksmaxx)

## API Documentation

- [OpenAPI Spec](https://megachad.xyz/.well-known/openapi.json): Full API schema for all endpoints
- [Agent Registration](https://megachad.xyz/.well-known/agent-registration.json): ERC-8004 agent identity and services
- [Agent Card (A2A)](https://megachad.xyz/.well-known/agent.json): Google A2A protocol agent card
- [MCP Server](https://megachad.xyz/api/mcp): Model Context Protocol server for tool-based agent interaction

## Core Endpoints

- [Swap Quote](https://megachad.xyz/api/x402/quote): Get swap instructions for buying $MEGACHAD with ETH via Kumbaya DEX
- [Looksmaxx (x402)](https://megachad.xyz/api/x402/looksmaxx): Payment-gated burn-to-create — GET for requirements, POST with burn proof + payment
- [Token Stats](https://megachad.xyz/api/stats): Total supply, circulating supply, tokens burned, burn count
- [Price](https://megachad.xyz/api/price): Current $MEGACHAD price and burn cost in ETH
- [Chadboard](https://megachad.xyz/api/chadboard): Burner leaderboard with tier badges, identity, and ERC-8004 reputation scores
- [Agent Info](https://megachad.xyz/api/agent/info): On-chain identity, registration status, contract addresses
- [Bridge Info](https://megachad.xyz/api/bridge): Bridge infrastructure for moving assets to MegaETH

## Natural Language & Agent Endpoints

- [NLP Chat](https://megachad.xyz/api/agent/chat): POST plain English → structured responses with calldata. Supports 17 intents including swap, burn, looksmaxx, cross-chain, compare, schedule, and multi-burn.
- [Agent Registration](https://megachad.xyz/api/agent/register): Register as referral agent (earn 5% per referred burn)
- [Referral Stats](https://megachad.xyz/api/agent/referrals): Agent earnings and referral count
- [Looksmaxx Plan](https://megachad.xyz/api/agent/looksmaxx): Full step-by-step burn plan with calldata

## Cross-Chain Intents

- [Cross-Chain Intent](https://megachad.xyz/api/cross-chain/intent): Build looksmaxx plans from any of 10 chains (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BNB, Avalanche, Scroll, zkSync, Linea). Returns bridge → swap → burn → generate → mint steps.
- [Intent Status](https://megachad.xyz/api/cross-chain/status): Track cross-chain intent progress

## Identity Layer

- [Identity Lookup](https://megachad.xyz/api/identity/ADDRESS): Unified MegaETH identity profile — MegaNames, balances, burn history, reputation, tier, referral stats. Accepts 0x addresses or .mega names.
- [Portfolio](https://megachad.xyz/api/portal/tokens): All MegaETH token balances for a wallet
- [Protocol Directory](https://megachad.xyz/api/portal/protocols): Curated MegaETH protocol directory

## Gasless Burns

- [Gasless Burn](https://megachad.xyz/api/gasless/burn): EIP-712 gasless burn via relayer — no gas fees needed

## Contract Addresses (MegaETH)

- [Token: $MEGACHAD](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0x374A17bd16B5cD76aaeFC9EAF76aE07e9aF3d888): 0x374A17bd16B5cD76aaeFC9EAF76aE07e9aF3d888
- [NFT Contract](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0x1f1eFd3476b95091B9332b2d36a24bDE12CC6296): 0x1f1eFd3476b95091B9332b2d36a24bDE12CC6296
- [Gasless Relayer](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0x87d67c0A351FeB2bB9F6985D55665544F94ebC9F): 0x87d67c0A351FeB2bB9F6985D55665544F94ebC9F
- [Referral Contract](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0xf85004d10AbA6200669FeB12C81d356027312181): 0xf85004d10AbA6200669FeB12C81d356027312181
- [Kumbaya Swap Router](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0xE5BbEF8De2DB447a7432A47EBa58924d94eE470e): 0xE5BbEF8De2DB447a7432A47EBa58924d94eE470e
- [ERC-8004 Identity Registry](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432): 0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432
- [ERC-8004 Reputation Registry](https://megaexplorer.xyz/address/0x8004BAa17C55a88189AE136b182e5fdA19dE9b63): 0x8004BAa17C55a88189AE136b182e5fdA19dE9b63

## Tier System

Burn count determines tier: Unburned → Normie (1+) → Mewer (5+) → Mogger (20+) → Gigachad (50+) → Eternal Chad (100+)

## How to Interact (Agent Flow)

1. Get a swap quote: GET /api/x402/quote?ethAmount=0.5
2. Swap ETH for $MEGACHAD on Kumbaya DEX (on-chain tx using params from quote)
3. Get looksmaxx requirements: GET /api/x402/looksmaxx (returns 402 with burn + payment details)
4. Burn tokens: transfer 112,500 $MEGACHAD to 0x...dEaD, transfer 112,500 to tren fund wallet
5. Submit: POST /api/x402/looksmaxx with burn tx hashes, base64 image, and x402 payment payload
6. Receive: looksmaxxed image URL, IPFS CID, and minted NFT token ID

Or use natural language: POST /api/agent/chat with {"message": "looksmaxx 0xYOUR_WALLET"}
Or cross-chain: GET /api/cross-chain/intent?sourceChain=base&wallet=0xYOUR_WALLET
